overview: Jadavpur University (JU), Kolkata, is one of India's premier public universities known for its strong emphasis on engineering, arts, and interdisciplinary education. It consistently delivers one of the highest returns on investment (ROI) in India due to its extremely low fees and strong placement performance. JU ranked 1st among State Public Universities in NIRF 2025.
accreditation: NAAC Grade A+ (CGPA 3.46, 4th Cycle); NBA accredited for key B.Tech programs (CSE, IT, Electrical, etc.).

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (General Courses – CSE, ME, EE, Civil, etc.)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹2,400 per year + ~₹600 other charges (Total ~₹3,000/year). Extremely subsidized.

placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Wells Fargo, Texas Instruments, Samsung, Airbus, PwC
placements.internationalOffers: Consistent ₹1 Cr+ international packages with strong global presence

keyTrends.highestPackageTrend: International highest ₹1.40 CPA (2023–24) → ₹1.80 CPA (2024–25); Domestic ₹57 LPA → ₹1.40 CPA

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are through WBJEE counseling. M.Tech admissions are based on GATE followed by university-level selection.
admissions.importantDates: Follows WBJEE and GATE counseling schedules.

campus.specialNote: Hostel: ₹25–₹30/month rent; Mess: ₹1,800–₹3,000/month. Total monthly cost ~₹2,000–₹3,000. One of the cheapest residential setups in India. Hostel admission fee ₹3,000 (one-time).

contact.address: Jadavpur University, 188 Raja S.C. Mallick Road, Kolkata – 700032, West Bengal, India
